decisions.decision: Reopen Phase 86.9 with Plan 03 rather than open a separate Phase 86.10
decisions.rationale: User chose 'Reopen 86.9 + Plan 03' option; cleanest paper trail when UAT defects surface immediately after phase closure

decisions.decision: D1 root cause confirmed empirically via debug-diag-86.9.js (browser-injected) before any code changed
decisions.rationale: Per user feedback 'Root cause first' — Frappe compute_y hypothesis (9px within-row offset) was refuted; real cause is .tg-locked rendering at 27.5px stretching parent rows to 45.5px instead of 42px

decisions.decision: Single-property CSS edit for D1 (.tg-locked padding 4px 6px -> 2px 6px)
decisions.rationale: Drops span rendered height from 27.5px to ~23px matching .tg-input; surgical fix, no refactor

decisions.decision: D2 fix bundled into one commit (3 CSS edits + 1 JS line)
decisions.rationale: All three changes address the same defect symptom (broken PDF); atomic commit keeps the fix coherent

decisions.decision: Keep debug-diag-86.9.js at project root until UAT closes
decisions.rationale: User chose 'Keep until UAT closes' so post-fix verification can re-run the same diagnostic without recreating it

decisions.decision: Requirement IDs GANTT-UX-ROW-ALIGN and GANTT-UX-PDF-EXPORT-FIX left out of ROADMAP.md
decisions.rationale: User chose 'Leave as-is — UAT closure'; reopen-style remediation IDs don't need roadmap entries
